## Meeting Purpose

[Interviewing George Chasiotis for the Account Director role.](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Role Shift:** GrowthX is changing its AD model from a management role to a pooled, strategic Individual Contributor (IC) role. This enables deep work by preventing directors from getting "sucked into the weeds" of daily execution.](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [**Candidate Profile:** George Chasiotis founded two agencies, Minutia (18 staff, 50+ B2B SaaS clients) and a LinkedIn growth agency (now winding down). He has deep experience in content strategy and operations.](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=299.0)
  - [**Strategic Approach:** Prioritizes high-impact work over client-requested tasks, using data to justify decisions. He focuses on achieving fast time-to-value (TTV) with quick wins, like content updates, to build momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [**Operational Style:** Uses a Notion-centric system for client collaboration and team alignment. He delegates execution to leads (SEO, Content) to maintain a strategic focus, providing direction via a central project document.](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=653.0)

## Topics

### The Account Director Role at GrowthX

  - [**Model:** Shifting from a management role over specific "pods" to a pooled, strategic IC resource.](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [**Function:** Directors are called in via Linear tickets for high-level strategic work (e.g., technical SEO audits, AI strategy, shifting priorities).](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=202.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The change enables deep strategic thinking by removing directors from daily management tasks.](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)

### Candidate Background & Experience

  - [**Minutia Agency (2020–2023):**](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
      - [Grew to 18 full-time staff and contractors.](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
      - [Served 50+ B2B SaaS clients (PLG, SLG, Enterprise, Technical, Marketplaces, Vertical).](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [**LinkedIn Growth Agency (2023–Present):**](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
      - [**Mistake:** Launched with three services (content, paid, signal-based outbound), causing buyer confusion.](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
      - [**Correction:** Pivoted to a single, clear "LinkedIn Growth" service.](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=455.0)
      - [**Success:** Developed a scalable process for founder-led content:](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
          - [Founder interview → AI-assisted transcript analysis → Content brief → Human-written draft → AI-assisted editing.](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
      - [**Outcome:** Winding down due to slow market adoption, but the content system is a proven asset.](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)

### Strategic Approach & Example

  - [**Prioritization:** Focuses on high-impact work over client-requested tasks. Uses data to justify decisions and push back on low-value requests.](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)
  - [**Time-to-Value (TTV):** A key goal is achieving fast TTV to build client momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
      - [**Established Clients:** Start with quick wins like content updates.](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=955.0)
      - [**Early-Stage Clients:** Focus on high-impact pages (e.g., alternatives, software listicles).](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [**Case Study: Promotional Products Client (2020)**](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
      - [**Problem:** Initial content attracted low-value, small-volume orders.](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
      - [**Solution:** Shifted strategy to target high-value use cases (e.g., company rebrands) and explicitly positioned content for bulk orders.](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)

### Team Management & Operations

  - [**Structure:** At Minutia, the team was organized into leads (SEO, Content) who managed ICs (strategists, writers).](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [**Client Communication:** Leads, not ICs, handled client communication to maintain a consistent strategic voice.](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [**Delegation:** Provided direction via a central Notion document detailing project goals and context. This gave leads autonomy for execution.](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Tucker:** Follow up with George Chasiotis after the interview.](https://fathom.video/share/kb5x8f_iq2ma-NKv1AWebnTG3HTE1iYz?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)
